query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN userType ENUM('centre3_employee', 'contractor', 'sub_contractor', 'client') DEFAULT 'centre3_employee',
ADD COLUMN employeeId VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN jobTitle VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN contractorCompanyId INT,
ADD COLUMN parentContractorId INT,
ADD COLUMN subContractorCompany VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN clientCompanyId INT,
ADD COLUMN contractReference VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN contractExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN reportingToId INT,
ADD COLUMN accountManagerId INT,
ADD COLUMN profilePhotoUrl VARCHAR(500);
